attributes.description: Tata Teleservices Ltd is engaged in the business of Wired and wireless telecommunication activities and holds a Unified License with Access Service Authorisation in Maharashtra and Goa and also as in Internet Service Provider Category The co. is focused on providing various wireline voice, data, and managed telecom services. [1][2]
